categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
categories.precondition: Starting at home or app's root, or at some default landing screen; user knows the destination screen exists within the app
abstract_steps: Open the app drawer if app shortcut not on home
Launch target app
Dismiss permission prompts and onboarding tooltips
Identify if target location is a virtual category or a physical path
From the current screen, identify the likely entry point (top-bar icon, menu item, settings row, primary navigation menu)
Select the appropriate top-level destination
Drill down through sub-folders/tabs/menus toward the target screen
If the resulting screen is wrong, back out and try the next candidate, iterating through known entry points (info icon, gear, overflow) systematically
Confirm target screen is visible
failure_modes: Confusing a category filter applied within the current folder with global navigation to that category
Opening the wrong adjacent item due to imprecise tap coordinates
Swipe gesture interpreted as long-press, opening home customization menu
Launching a similarly-named but wrong app (e.g. dialer vs. contacts manager)
Tooltip overlays obscuring desired control
Confusing icons with similar appearance
Getting trapped in modal dialogs (permissions, defaults) that close the app on cancel
Mis-tapping on adjacent UI elements
verification_checklist: Header/breadcrumb/page title reflects the intended destination
Visible content matches expectations for that location
Expected controls are interactive
Target screen's distinguishing visual cues are present
Back navigation returns to a known prior screen

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: Target item, list, or information is reachable somewhere in the app
abstract_steps: Navigate to the most likely container screen (list / detail / about / settings / tab / help)
Optionally apply filters or search to narrow the view
Use search or scroll to locate the data
Read the requested attribute/value/count/status from the list card, item-detail/info screen, or rendered UI
Return the value in the requested format
failure_modes: Reading from a filtered subset that excludes the target
Confusing modification time with creation time
Counting items while extra filters are still active
Misreading empty-state as a value other than zero
Filter not applied, leading to wrong count
Information located in a different app than expected
Reading truncated preview text instead of the full content
Assuming a value from the list when the detail differs
Searching with overly strict formatting (e.g., punctuation) and getting no results
Looking in the wrong menu (overflow vs info icon vs gear)
verification_checklist: Value taken from the authoritative detail view when precision is needed
All required filters are active and only those
Result reported in the requested units/format
Source screen clearly shows the answered value
Empty-state messages map to 0/None
Value matches the literal text shown on screen
If multiple matches exist, the correct contextual one was chosen

categories.name: SEARCH_ENTRY
categories.precondition: App provides a search affordance and/or filter chips on a listing view
abstract_steps: Open the search interface or tap filter chip
Type the query string or provide selection
Optionally apply category/type filters
Submit if needed (keyboard enter)
Inspect results or empty state
failure_modes: Searching within a narrower scope than intended
Typing into a non-focused field (accidentally editing content)
Chip is off-screen; needs horizontal swipe
Search not executed because submit not pressed
No results misinterpreted
verification_checklist: Query text shown in the search bar
Applied filters are highlighted/active
Result list (or explicit no-match state) is visible

categories.name: DELETE_HISTORY_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Search interface exposes recent queries
abstract_steps: Open search, ensure input is empty so history is shown
Locate the target history row
Tap the per-row dismiss control
failure_modes: Target entry not present (already cleared or never recorded)
Confusing executing a new search with viewing history
verification_checklist: Target row no longer appears in the history list

categories.name: CHANGE_VIEW_OR_SORT
categories.precondition: List/grid view is currently shown
abstract_steps: Locate the layout toggle or overflow menu
Toggle layout or pick the desired sort criterion
Confirm the visible change
failure_modes: Misreading the toggle icon (it represents the alternate mode, not the current one)
Selection mode blocking interaction with view controls
verification_checklist: Items visibly re-arranged in target layout/order
Toggle icon now shows the opposite state

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: User is in a list-style or writable container screen of the relevant data domain with an add affordance available, and permission/default-app prerequisites satisfied
abstract_steps: Trigger the add-new-entry control (primary create affordance, floating action button, '+' icon, or overflow create menu)
Choose the create-new option if a menu appears
Focus each required input field explicitly before typing
Type each piece of data into the corresponding field
If a field's label/category is configurable, open its selector and choose the requested option
Optionally attach media (capture or pick) via the dedicated picker dialog
Dismiss the on-screen keyboard if it hides remaining fields (system back) or scroll the form
If a follow-up form appears, fill remaining required fields
Submit/save using the primary action (often top-right) or confirm with checkmark/OK
failure_modes: Attempting to create in a virtual/filtered view that disallows creation
Submitting without entering a name
Tapping near the avatar/header accidentally opens the photo picker
Typing without focusing a field causes data loss or duplication
Premature save with empty required fields triggers validation error
Auto-suggested text or pre-existing text concatenates with typed text
Tapping a similar icon that opens a different mode (e.g., add-participant vs add-contact)
Forgetting to press the final Save/checkmark, leaving changes unpersisted
Dismissing required permission/default-handler prompts and being kicked out of the app
verification_checklist: New entry appears in the destination list or relevant screen
Breadcrumb/location is the intended container
Post-save detail view shows all entered values
Confirmation toast/snackbar appears with entity name
Configurable labels reflect chosen option
Attached media renders as expected
Returning to the list and re-opening shows the entry persisted

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target item can be selected and an action menu is reachable, or entry detail view is open
abstract_steps: Long-press or otherwise select the item, or open the entity detail view
Activate edit mode (e.g., pencil icon) or open the action menu and choose the edit/rename action
Focus the field needing change
Clear existing content via long-press select or backspace
Type corrected value while preserving constraints (e.g., extensions)
Scroll to reveal fields hidden by the keyboard
Confirm/save the change
failure_modes: Single-tap inadvertently opens the item instead of selecting it
Overwriting protected portions like the file extension
Replacing text without selecting first causes append instead of overwrite
Dismissing without saving loses edits
Editing a similarly-named entity by mistake
Keyboard obscuring fields, leading to no input
Field unfocused at moment of typing, so input is lost
verification_checklist: Updated value appears in the list
Constraints preserved (extension, type)
Detail view reflects updated values
No leftover duplicate characters
Confirmation toast appears
Re-entering edit mode shows persisted values

categories.name: MOVE_OR_COPY_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Item is selectable; destination is accessible
abstract_steps: Select the item and choose move/copy
Navigate the destination picker to the target container
Optionally create a new sub-container at the destination
Confirm the operation
failure_modes: Confirming at the wrong directory (placing item in parent rather than new sub-folder)
Cancelling by pressing back at the picker
verification_checklist: Source no longer contains the item (for move) or still contains it (for copy)
Destination contains the item

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target item exists and is selectable/locatable via list, search, or detail view, and a delete action exists
abstract_steps: Locate the target item (scroll or search)
Enter selection or detail mode (long-press for list items, open detail for single items)
Invoke the delete affordance (trash icon or overflow -> Delete)
Confirm the destructive action in the confirmation dialog
failure_modes: Single-tap opening the item instead of selecting
Cancelling the confirmation
Entry not found -> nothing to delete (may already be absent)
Confirmation dialog dismissed accidentally
Selecting the wrong item due to similar names/numbers
Confusing delete-thread with delete-message-content
Repeating confirm taps because UI state did not refresh
verification_checklist: Toast/snackbar/feedback indicating deletion
Item no longer appears in the list or search
Empty-state text or updated count is shown
No success toast indicates pending action; re-check to ensure removal

categories.name: OPEN_WITH_EXTERNAL_APP
categories.precondition: System chooser is available for the item type
abstract_steps: Trigger open action on the item
Select desired handler app in the chooser
Choose one-time or default association
failure_modes: Confirming 'Always/Just once' before selecting an app (controls disabled)
Chooser not appearing because a default is already set
verification_checklist: Target app launches with the item loaded
If permanent default was requested, subsequent opens skip the chooser

categories.name: EDIT_TEXT_DOCUMENT
categories.precondition: Document open in a text editor
abstract_steps: Position cursor via tap or search tool
Insert, delete, or replace content
Optionally toggle preview to verify rendering
Save changes
failure_modes: Edits made outside the intended region
Forgetting to save (save indicator still active)
verification_checklist: Save indicator is inactive/greyed
Reopen shows updated content

categories.name: FIND_AND_REPLACE_IN_DOCUMENT
categories.precondition: Editor exposes a find/replace tool
abstract_steps: Open the search tool
Switch to the find-and-replace mode if a simple search appears first
Enter search and replacement strings
Apply replace-all and save
failure_modes: Using a search-only dialog and missing the toggle to replace mode
Replacing partial matches due to case/whole-word options
verification_checklist: Match count shown before replace
Document content reflects all replacements
File saved

categories.name: FIND_TEXT_IN_RENDERED_PAGE
categories.precondition: Page is rendered in a browser-like viewer
abstract_steps: Open the browser menu
Choose Find in page
Type the query and read the match counter
If counter is 0/0, ensure page is fully loaded/interacted with
failure_modes: Page not yet rendered when searching
Dynamic content requiring interaction to appear
verification_checklist: Counter reflects expected occurrences
Highlighted matches visible on page

categories.name: SHARE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Item selectable; share intent supported
abstract_steps: Select the item
Invoke share action
Choose a sharing channel
Complete channel-specific steps
failure_modes: Channel requires capability not present (e.g., no paired devices)
Permissions or system toggles disabled
verification_checklist: Send/Completed indication from the share target
If unable to complete, document the blocker and continue

categories.name: CHANGE_SETTING
categories.precondition: On the app's settings/preferences area or system settings screen reachable from the app, or relevant setting exists in an overflow menu
abstract_steps: Open the overflow menu or settings screen within the relevant scope
Locate the section containing the setting/preference (scroll if necessary)
Tap the row/toggle to open chooser dialog or toggle directly
Select desired option / flip toggle / input the desired value
Confirm any follow-up dialog or save if required
failure_modes: Setting only applies within current scope/view
Setting requires elevated permission
Setting not present where expected (looking in wrong submenu)
Dialog dismissed without selecting, leaving setting unchanged
Confusing 'system' vs 'app' setting locations
Mistaking an adjacent option (e.g., icon color vs theme)
Forgetting to press the final save control
Triggering a warning dialog and not understanding it
verification_checklist: Menu reflects new state on reopen
Content view reflects the new behavior
Sub-label or toggle state reflects new value
Returning to setting later still shows the value
Visual effect (color, language) is applied across the UI

categories.name: BLOCK_OR_RESTRICT_ITEM
categories.precondition: On a management screen exposing a block/restriction list
abstract_steps: Open the add-restriction control
Focus the identifier input field explicitly
Type the identifier
Confirm via primary action button (only enabled when input populated)
failure_modes: Typing without focus leaves field empty and confirm disabled
Toggling unrelated switches by mistake
verification_checklist: Item appears in restriction list
Toggle states match intent

categories.name: IMPORT_OR_EXPORT_DATA
categories.precondition: On management/tools screen offering import/export actions
abstract_steps: Select the desired import/export action
Use the file picker drawer to choose source/destination folder
Confirm save or select file
failure_modes: Source has no data to import (empty SIM/file)
File picker defaults to wrong location
verification_checklist: Confirmation toast or new file presence
Or clear message indicating empty source

categories.name: MARK_FAVORITE_OR_FLAG
categories.precondition: Entry detail view open with star/flag affordance
abstract_steps: Tap the star/flag icon
Verify icon state changed
failure_modes: Tapping wrong icon (overflow vs star)
Icon state ambiguous; repeated taps may un-favorite
verification_checklist: Icon filled/highlighted
Entry appears under favorites list

categories.name: COMPOSE_AND_SEND_MESSAGE
categories.precondition: Messaging surface available and recipient identifiable
abstract_steps: Open or create the target conversation by recipient identifier
Focus the message input field
Enter the message text
Trigger the send control
Verify the sent indicator (bubble + delivery mark) appears
failure_modes: Sending in the wrong thread because of a similar number
Hitting send before text is committed
Permissions/default-handler prompt blocking the send
Typing into a different focused field (e.g., recipient instead of body)
verification_checklist: Outgoing bubble with exact text appears in the thread
Delivery/sent indicator shown
Recipient header matches target

categories.name: HANDLE_PERMISSION_OR_DEFAULT_HANDLER_PROMPT
categories.precondition: App requires a system role or permission that has not yet been granted
abstract_steps: Read the dialog and identify the required role/permission
Select the correct option (often the target app's own entry)
Press the affirmative confirm button
Wait for app's main UI to load
failure_modes: Pressing cancel/back and getting bounced out of the app
Selecting the wrong app in a chooser
Repeatedly toggling the role and creating loops
verification_checklist: Dialog dismisses and app's main UI is visible
Subsequent actions that depend on the role succeed
